text.title: Insight-to-Design-Ticket Worked Example
text.summary: End-to-end worked example showing inputs to procedure to output for a typical instance of Insight-to-Design-Ticket.

example.scenario: Insight from a 5-user research session: 4/5 users abandon onboarding at step 3 due to missing progress indication. Ticket BCC-203: hypothesis IF progress bar added THEN step-3 dropoff < 25%; metric: funnel report; constraints: token spacing.md, WCAG AA, motion ≤150ms; draft AC: bar visible, 3-step semantics, keyboard accessible.
example.trace: r1-four-section-structure → r2-hypothesis-if-then-form → r3-metric-or-no-metric-decision → r5-evidence-link-required → ticket stored
